name: Esker Recycled Resin Outdoor Patio Loveseat Brown - Threshold™
description:
Enjoy relaxing moments with a loved one by sitting on the Esker Outdoor Patio Loveseat from Threshold™. Designed with a wooden frame, this outdoor loveseat features neutral-shade upholstery to complement a variety of porch or patio decor. It boasts a weather-resistant design to help you enjoy all the seasons outdoors in comfort, and you can add a coordinating slatted table to create a perfect sitting arrangement for two or pair it with extra seats to accommodate other family members or guests.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
